chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-3869 of 2021 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 2393 of 2021 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2021 Mr. Mohammad Rahib Lakho advocates for the Petitioner along with Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG alongwith Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Lakhair, Legal Assistant, Estate Office ************* Legal Assistant, Estate Office, present and contends that, the property occupied by an unauthorized person and they need police help. Unauthorized possession cannot be termed as legal in any way; hence competent authority shall proceed and respondents No. 5 & 6 shall be provided every assistance and possession of the quarter/property shall be handover to the person who is entitled for the same. The instant constitution petition is disposed of. The report thereof shall be submitted within fifteen days. J U D G E J U D G E BrohiPS
